Property Dispute.title: LEGAL NOTICE - UNAUTHORIZED POSSESSION
Property Dispute.content:
To,
Mr./Ms. [RECIPIENT_NAME]
[RECIPIENT_ADDRESS]

SUBJECT: FINAL LEGAL NOTICE FOR THE DELIVERY OF PEACEFUL POSSESSION OF PROPERTY NO. [PROPERTY_ID] SITUATED AT [ADDRESS] AND RECOVERY OF ARREARS OF MESNE PROFITS.

Dear Sir/Madam,

Under the instructions of my client [CLIENT_NAME], son of [FATHER_NAME], residing at [ADDRESS], I hereby serve you with the following peremptory Legal Notice:

1. That my client is the absolute and lawful owner of the residential/commercial premises bearing No. [PROPERTY_ID] (hereinafter referred to as 'The Said Property').

2. That you were inducted as a licensee/tenant for a temporary period which stood expired on [DATE], whereby you were legally bound to vacate the premises.

3. That despite several verbal reminders and visits, you have failed to deliver the peaceful possession, making your stay unauthorized and in the nature of a trespasser.

4. That my client is suffering immense financial loss and mental agony due to your illegal occupation.

NOW, THEREFORE, I hereby call upon you to:
a) Deliver peaceful, vacant possession of the premises to my client within 15 days of this notice.
b) Pay a sum of Rs. [AMOUNT] as damages for illegal use and occupation for the period starting [DATE].

Take note that if you fail to comply, my client has instructed me to initiate Civil and Criminal proceedings against you at your cost and risk.

A copy of this notice is retained in my office for future record.

Sincerely,

[ADVOCATE_NAME]
Advocate
Enrolment No: [BAR_ID]

House Rent Agreement.title: RESIDENTIAL LEASE DEED
House Rent Agreement.content:
STAMP PAPER VALUATION: Rs. 100/-

RESIDENTIAL RENT AGREEMENT / LEASE DEED

This Lease Deed is executed at [CITY] on this [DAY]th day of [MONTH], [YEAR] (hereinafter referred to as the 'Effective Date') by and between:

Mr./Ms. [LANDLORD_NAME], S/O [FATHER_NAME], R/O [LANDLORD_ADDRESS] (hereinafter referred to as the 'LESSOR', which expression shall mean and include his heirs, successors, and assigns)

AND

Mr./Ms. [TENANT_NAME], S/O [TENANT_FATHER], R/O [TENANT_PERM_ADDRESS] (hereinafter referred to as the 'LESSEE', which expression shall mean and include his heirs, successors, and assigns).

WHEREAS the LESSOR is the absolute owner of the property bearing No. [PROPERTY_ADDRESS] (hereinafter referred to as the 'DEMISED PREMISES').

NOW THIS INDENTURE WITNESSETH AS UNDER:

1. PERIOD OF LEASE: The lease shall be for a total period of 11 (Eleven) months commencing from [START_DATE].

2. RENT: The LESSEE shall pay a monthly rent of Rs. [RENT_AMOUNT]/- (Rupees [RENT_WORD] Only) on or before the 7th day of each English Calendar month in advance.

3. SECURITY DEPOSIT: The LESSEE has deposited a sum of Rs. [DEPOSIT_AMOUNT]/- as an interest-free security deposit, refundable upon vacation/handover of the premises.

4. MAINTENANCE & CHARGES: The LESSEE shall pay all electricity, water, and society maintenance charges as per actual consumption/billing.

5. TERMINATION: Either party may terminate this agreement by giving 30 (Thirty) days' prior written notice to the other party.

6. JURISDICTION: This agreement shall be governed by the laws of India and only the courts at [CITY] shall have exclusive jurisdiction.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF the parties hereto have signed this Lease Deed after reading and understanding the contents thereof.

LESSOR: ________________________
LESSEE: ________________________
WITNESS 1: _____________________
WITNESS 2: _____________________

Criminal Defense.title: BAIL APPLICATION U/S 437 OF CrPC
Criminal Defense.content:
IN THE COURT OF THE LD. METROPOLITAN MAGISTRATE, [DISTRICT_COURT], [CITY]

Case No: ________________ of 2026
FIR No: [FIR_ID]
Police Station: [P_STATION]
U/S: [SECTIONS] IPC/BNS

IN THE MATTER OF:
State vs. [CLIENT_NAME]

APPLICATION FOR GRANT OF REGULAR BAIL ON BEHALF OF THE ACCUSED [CLIENT_NAME]

MOST RESPECTFULLY SHOWETH:

1. That the applicant is a permanent resident of [ADDRESS] and has deep roots in the society.

2. That the applicant has been falsely implicated by the investigating agency in the aforementioned FIR with malafide intentions.

3. That the search and seizure conducted by the police were not in accordance with the mandatory provisions of Section 100 CrPC.

4. That no recovery has been made from the person or the instance of the applicant, and he is not required for any further custodial interrogation.

5. That the applicant is ready and willing to join the investigation as and when required and shall abide by any conditions imposed by this Hon'ble Court.

PRAYER:
It is, therefore, prayed that the applicant may be ordered to be released on bail in the interest of justice.

Place: [CITY]
Date: [DATE]

Applicant Through

[ADVOCATE_NAME]
Advocate

Corporate Contract.title: NON-DISCLOSURE & CONFIDENTIALITY AGREEMENT
Corporate Contract.content:
CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT (NDA)

This Confidentiality and Non-Disclosure Agreement (the 'Agreement') is entered into on this [DATE] (the 'Effective Date') by and between:

[PARTY_A_NAME], a [ENTITY_TYPE] incorporated under the laws of India, having its registered office at [ADDRESS] (hereinafter referred to as the 'DISCLOSING PARTY');

AND

[PARTY_B_NAME], a [ENTITY_TYPE] incorporated under the laws of India, having its registered office at [ADDRESS] (hereinafter referred to as the 'RECEIVING PARTY').

1. DEFINITION OF CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION: 'Confidential Information' includes all non-public, proprietary information shared during the evaluation period for the [PROJECT_NAME].

2. OBLIGATIONS: The Receiving Party shall use at least the same degree of care to protect the Disclosing Party's Confidential Information as it uses to protect its own, but in no event less than reasonable care.

3. NO LICENSE: Nothing in this Agreement shall be construed as granting any rights to the Receiving Party by license or otherwise.

4. REMEDIES: The Receiving Party acknowledges that any unauthorized disclosure would cause irreparable harm for which monetary damages would be inadequate.

FOR [PARTY_A_NAME]: ____________________
FOR [PARTY_B_NAME]: ____________________

Default.title: GENERAL AFFIDAVIT OF DECLARATION
Default.content:
BEFORE THE OATH COMMISSIONER / NOTARY PUBLIC, [CITY]

AFFIDAVIT

I, [CLIENT_NAME], son of [FATHER_NAME], aged about [AGE] years, resident of [ADDRESS], do hereby solemnly affirm and declare on oath as follows:

1. That I am the deponent herein and am fully aware of the facts stated in this affidavit.
2. That [STATEMENT_OF_FACTS].
3. That the contents of the above affidavit are true and correct to the best of my knowledge and belief, and nothing material has been concealed therefrom.

DEPONENT

VERIFICATION:
Verified at [CITY] on this [DAY] day of [MONTH], 2026, that the contents of paragraphs 1 to 3 of the above affidavit are true and correct to the best of my knowledge and no part of it is false.

DEPONENT
